A strong leadership education is a key factor in improving the abilities of future engineers to be effective team members and leaders in the companies and agencies in which they will work

SWOT is a good method for finding the current situation analysis.

خطأ

The two main branches of statistics are:

Descriptive and inferential statistics.

Predictive and inferential statistics.

Descriptive and predictive statistics

Differential and inferential statistics.
Descriptive and inferential statistics.

Which of the following statements is not a characteristic of the normal distribution:

Bell shaped

Symetrical

the mean is always zero

the mean, median and mode are equal
The mean is always zero.

Percent idle time for men or machines is found by

work sampling.

time study.

method study.

Synthesis method
Work sampling.

In micro motion study, therblig is described by

a symbol

an event.

micro motions

standard symbol and color
A symbol.

The correct order of procedure in method study is

Select – Define – Examine – Develop – Record – Install – Maintain

Select – Record – Develop – Examine – Define – Install – Maintain

Select – Record – Examine – Develop – Define – Install – Maintain

Select – Record – Examine – Define – Develop – Install – Maintain.
Select – Record – Examine – Develop – Define – Install – Maintain.

Workers NOT performing physical works tend to become less efficient at temperatures above 32 oC,
إختر واحداً:
صح
خطأ
خطأ.

Important considerations to remember in lifting, include:

Use mechanical means

It is easier to push than to pull

Keep the load as close as possible to the body

Bend at the knees, not the hips

Place items to be lifted within the power zone

All other choices
All other choices are important considerations to remember in lifting.

The stage of the product life cycle have a peak sales and high profit

Introduction

Decline

Growth

Maturity
Growth.

Which option of supply chain distribution network has the highest time to market

Manufacturer Storage with Direct Shipping

Distributor Storage with Last Mile Delivery

Manufacturer or Distributor Storage with Customer Pickup

Retail Storage with Customer Pickup
Manufacturer Storage with Direct Shipping has the highest time to market.

transforms inputs to outputs to create the product according to new product specifications:

Service

New Product Development

Operations

Distribution
Operations.

The SPC based on two process properties. These two properties are:

Stability and effectiveness.

Robustness and Efficiency.

hole diameter

Stability and Capability.
Stability and Capability.

Which of the following statement is true?

None of the above responses

A defect item contains many defectives

Defect and Defective are synonyms

A defective item contains many defects
A defective item contains many defects.

Suppose in a day one product checker checked 100 pieces. He found total of 15 defective pieces and in those 15 pieces total 60 defects were found. We can conclude that

DHU = 15 and Percentage Defective = 75%

Equiv. σ = 3.62

DHU = 60 and Percentage Defective = 15%

DHU = 45 and Percentage Defective = 15%
DHU = 45 and Percentage Defective = 15%.

The object of a statistical process control (SPC) system is to

provide a signal when assignable causes of variation are present.

assess the customer expectations.

provide a signal when natural causes of variation are present.

eliminate natural causes of variation.
provide a signal when assignable causes of variation are present.

In transportation problem with 3 supply points and 5 demand points, how many number of constraints are required in its LP formulation?

6

8

15

None of these responses
